<!-- hero: monochrome ASCII portrait (types in) beside a neofetch-style info
     panel. regenerate portrait: python scripts/prep_photo.py <photo> &&
     python scripts/make_ascii_svg.py ; info panel: python scripts/make_info_card.py -->

<!-- animated contribution graph: real data, boxes reveal cell by cell
     (regenerated daily by .github/workflows/update-profile-art.yml) -->

<h3><code>ankit@github ~ $ ./contributions.sh</code></h3>

<img src="./contrib-heatmap.svg" width="860" alt="Ankit's GitHub contribution graph — auto-refreshed daily" />

<br>
<br>

<h3><code>ankit@github ~ $ whoami</code></h3>

<table>
<tr>
<td valign="top"><img src="./ankit-ascii.svg" width="370" alt="Ankit Debroy — ASCII portrait" /></td>
<td valign="top"><img src="./info-card.svg" width="490" alt="Ankit Debroy — experience, stack, highlights" /></td>
</tr>
</table>

<h3><code>ankit@github ~ $ ./links.sh</code></h3>

<p><b>Software Engineer · Backend Developer · ML/AI Enthusiast</b></p>
